Video.summary: This documentary explores how a group of surfers revolutionized surfing in 1975.
Video.title: Bustin' Down The Door

Video.summary: Dirty Old Wedge is the real life story of the world's most infamous shorebreak and those who live it
Video.title: Dirty Old Wedge

Video.summary: L E N A documents the purpose and persistent journey of the first German female big wave surfer.
Video.title: LENA

Video.summary: Witness the large waves from Hurricane Marie that were pounding the Southern California coast.
Video.title: A Wedge to Remember

Video.summary: Dive into the ultimate surf adventure with surfing legends riding epic waves in Hawaii, California, & Mexico.
Video.title: Surfing Is Art

Video.summary: Kelly Slater, Tom Curren, John John Florence and more explore the essence of California's surfing scene.
Video.title: Surfing Golden California

Video.summary: Teen phenom Caroline Marks: pro at 13, now surging and set to represent her country.
Video.title: That's Caroline

Video.summary: He was the world's first Olympic surfing gold medalist. Can the Brazilian surfing sensation Ítalo Ferreira now wrap up the World Surf League Championship Tour title for the second successive time?
Video.title: The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira

Image.alt: The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira
The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira

Video.summary: Inside Kai Lenny’s life: from kiteboarding to big waves, he’s mastered every water sport.
Video.title: Paradigm Lost

Video.summary: Lady Killers follows top female surfers risking it all, featuring Moore, Marks, and Simmers in 4K action.
Video.title: Lady Killers

Video.summary: Is Frank Solomon a kind-hearted surfer or a hard-living bad boy? The man and myth may be inseparable.
Video.title: Let's Be Frank

Video.summary: Taylor and his surfer buddies think they have struck gold when he inherits a mansion by the beach.
Video.title: Ghost Babe

Video.summary: Explore Honolulu’s pristine waves, culture, community, and deep Hawaiian heritage.
Video.title: Honolulu

Video.summary: Florida’s long coast, heavy waves, and champ pedigree make it a best-kept surfing secret.
Video.title: Florida

Video.summary: Shot on16mm film, Return To Zero explores the theme of life, death and reincarnation through a surfboard.
Video.title: Return to Zero

Video.summary: Japan blends tradition, technology, and quality swell to emerge as a surf hotspot.
Video.title: Japan

Video.summary: From Eastern Suburbs to Northern Beaches, dive into Sydney’s vibrant surf culture.
Video.title: Sydney

Video.summary: Anastasia Ashley recounts lessons learned as a haole grom on the North Shore.
Video.title: Anastasia Ashley's Inspiring Story

Video.summary: The North Shore is a 7 Mile stretch of paradise like no other on Earth. Every year thousands of people flock to the North Shore of Oahu to see the world's best surfers ride arguably the world's best waves. Pro surfers have created their careers, made their livings and even become legends from surfing these shores. Pro surfer Anastasia Ashley will be your tour guide and take you to the places she loves, the places she went as a kid growing up there, and introduce you to the people that always made it feel like home. We will experience and understand why she loves the North Shore, and considers it '7 Miles of Paradise'
Video.title: 7 Miles of Paradise

Video.summary: The Essence of Surfing is a riveting surf documentary that gets to the heart of why surfing is the greatest sport in the world. Featuring surfers of all kinds, from the neighborhood grom to some of the greatest surfers to ever live, The Essence of Surfing uncovers what it is about this awesome sport that makes it a necessary part of each of their lives. Shot in the world's most beautiful locations by top notch Cinematographers Erik Ippel and Mike Prickett, this film is sure to hook and inspire anyone looking to get wet and catch some waves.
Video.title: The Essence of Surfing

Video.summary: The true spirit of longboarding showcasing that the best waves are the ones you catch with your friends.
Video.title: Awesome Longboard Bros

Video.summary: Rock jumps on Australia’s coast, then a wakesurf challenge to see who stays up longest.
Video.title: Wakesurf

Video.summary: Jamie and Poopies try go-boats on NSW waves, get tossed, then skydive over the coast.
Video.title: Go-Boats

Video.summary: New Zealand arrival: before surfing, Jamie starts with a fearsome bridge bungee in Auckland.
Video.title: New Zealand

Video.summary: To Be Frank explores authenticity and community in surfing via Frank Paine, a 73-year-old South Bay icon.
Video.title: To Be Frank

Video.summary: Singlefin Yellow tells the story of one surfboards life as it travels the globe shared by a group of friends.
Video.title: SingleFin: Yellow

Video.summary: Final season starts: Hawaii to Australia, the crew road-trips a motorhome along the coast.
Video.title: Motorhome

Video.summary: At the first Aussie surf stop, Poopies breaks a fin; Jamie gives him a fresh haircut.
Video.title: Aussie Surf

Video.summary: NZ sand dunes: eyebrow challenge, skim boards, skis, and Poopies surfs in women’s lingerie.
Video.title: Sand Dunes

Video.summary: Shallow-river tow rides and sandy drags, then downhill rolls in giant inflatable balls.
Video.title: Shallow-River

Video.summary: They raft the world’s highest commercial waterfall—can big-wave surfers handle it?
Video.title: Raft

Video.summary: Jamie O’Brien and pals look back on Who Is J.O.B.—favorite stunts, pranks, and waves.
Video.title: A Look Back

Video.summary: Mark Mathews, big-wave champ and speaker, confronts fear to inspire anyone in tough fights.
Video.title: The Other Side of Fear
